\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4241 introduces Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \\Delta\\phi\\!\\left(\\frac{16}{15}\\right) &amp;= \\frac{\\pi}{15} \\approx 12^\\circ, \\\\ \\Delta\\phi\\!\\left(\\frac{10}{9}\\right) &amp;= \\frac{\\pi}{9} \\approx 20^\\circ...", "idea_topic": "theoretical_physics", "formation_context": "sured in radians. For the ratios of interest, \\begin{align} \\Delta\\phi\\!\\left(\\frac{16}{15}\\right) &amp;= \\frac{\\pi}{15} \\approx 12^\\circ, \\\\ \\Delta\\phi\\!\\left(\\frac{10}{9}\\right) &amp;= \\frac{\\pi}{9} \\approx 20^\\circ, \\\\ \\Delta\\phi(\\chi) &amp;= \\frac{5\\pi}{27} \\approx 33.34^\\circ. \\end{align}
